pred_reason: The contract contains multiple high-severity reentrancy vulnerabilities (SWC-107) due to external calls before state changes, and integer overflow risks (SWC-101) from unsafe arithmetic operations despite SafeMath usage in some areas. Evidence: Reentrancy found in deposit/withdraw functions violating checks-effects-interactions; External calls to tokens without proper safeguards enable reentrancy attacks; Integer overflow/underflow risks identified in arithmetic operations
